assertion.value: Ethical approval and consent to participateThis project was approved by the research and ethical committee of the Instituto Nacional de Enfermedades Respiratorias under approval number C48-20 and the Instituto Nacional de Neurologia y Neurocirugia under approval number 06–21. Signed informed consent was obtained from all participants and the procedures about human research were according to the Helsinki declaration.
